recommendations.title: The Pick-up Artist
recommendations.overview: A womanizer meets his match when he falls for the daughter of a gambling addict who is in debt to the mob.

recommendations.title: 68 Kill
recommendations.overview: Chip's problem is that he can't say no to beautiful women. This weakness gets him into a world of trouble when he agrees to help his girlfriend steal $68,000.

recommendations.title: The Notebook

recommendations.title: The Killing of a Chinese Bookie
recommendations.overview: Cosmo Vittelli, the proprietor of a sleazy, low-rent Hollywood cabaret, has a real affection for the women who strip in his peepshows and the staff who keep up his dingy establishment. He also has a major gambling problem that has gotten him in troub

recommendations.title: I Vitelloni
recommendations.overview: Five young men dream of success as they drift lazily through life in a small Italian village. Fausto, the group's leader, is a womanizer; Riccardo craves fame; Alberto is a hopeless dreamer; Moraldo fantasizes about life in the city; and Leopoldo is

recommendations.title: The Perfect Date
recommendations.overview: No beau? No problem! To earn money for college, a high schooler creates a dating app that lets him act as a stand-in boyfriend.

recommendations.title: The Cable Guy

recommendations.title: Landscape with Invisible Hand

recommendations.title: Scarlet Street
recommendations.overview: Cashier and part-time starving artist Christopher Cross is absolutely smitten with the beautiful Kitty March. Kitty plays along, but she's really only interested in Johnny, a two-bit crook. When Kitty and Johnny find out that art dealers are interest

recommendations.title: ¿Quieres ser mi hijo?
recommendations.overview: Lu, a conformist woman in her forties, learns that her 15-year partner has been having extramarital affairs. Starting from scratch, she gets involved in an unexpected relationship with a young womanizer.
